name: io.github.scka-de/opensanctions-mcp
description: Sanctions screening and PEP checks via OpenSanctions API for AI agents

environmentVariables.description: OpenSanctions API key. Get a free key at https://www.opensanctions.org/api/
environmentVariables.name: OPENSANCTIONS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: API URL. Defaults to https://api.opensanctions.org. Set to your self-hosted yente URL if applicable.
environmentVariables.name: OPENSANCTIONS_API_URL
